nasb.text: The fourth for the fourth month was Asahel the brother of Joab, and Zebadiah his son after him; and in his division were 24,000.

esv.text: Asahel the brother of Joab was fourth, for the fourth month, and his son Zebadiah after him; in his division were 24,000.

cnv.text: 四月第四班的軍長是約押的兄弟亞撒黑，接續他的是他的兒子西巴第雅；他那一班有二萬四千人。

ccb.text: 约押的兄弟亚撒黑负责第四班，在四月当值，他班内有两万四千人，他儿子西巴第雅后来接替了他。
